en.hero.description: QuantCell is a comprehensive quantitative trading platform featuring strategy backtesting, real-time market data, multi-exchange support, and advanced risk management tools.
en.features.title: Powerful Features for Quantitative Trading
en.features.subtitle: Everything you need to develop, test, and deploy professional trading strategies
en.features.backtesting.title: Strategy Backtesting
en.features.backtesting.description: Self-developed high-performance backtesting engine with Numba JIT optimization. Supports both event-driven and vectorized execution modes for maximum flexibility.
en.features.realtime.title: Real-time Market Data
en.features.realtime.description: WebSocket-based real-time data streaming from multiple exchanges with automatic reconnection and data integrity checks.
en.features.exchanges.title: Multi-Exchange Support
en.features.exchanges.description: Unified API for Binance, OKX, and more. Seamlessly switch between exchanges with consistent interface.
en.features.risk.title: Risk Management
en.features.risk.description: Comprehensive risk controls including position sizing, stop-loss, take-profit, and portfolio-level risk monitoring.
en.features.visualization.title: Advanced Visualization
en.features.visualization.description: Professional K-line charts with technical indicators, trade markers, and backtest replay functionality.
en.features.plugins.title: Extensible Plugin System
en.features.plugins.description: Modular architecture with plugin support. Easily extend functionality with custom indicators, strategies, and data sources.
en.architecture.title: Modern Architecture
en.architecture.description: Built with a clean separation of concerns, QuantCell's architecture enables rapid development, easy testing, and seamless deployment.
en.architecture.points.adapter.title: Adapter Pattern
en.architecture.points.adapter.description: Strategy logic separated from execution engines. Unified architecture supports both backtesting and live trading with the same codebase.
en.architecture.points.performance.title: High Performance
en.architecture.points.performance.descript: Built-in caching, parallel processing, and Numba optimization for maximum execution speed.
en.architecture.points.extensible.title: Highly Extensible
en.architecture.points.extensible.descripti: Rich hook functions and plugin system for customizing every aspect of your trading workflow.
en.code.title: Simple Yet Powerful
en.code.subtitle: Write your strategy in pure Python. QuantCell handles the complexity.
en.code.features.intuitive.title: Intuitive API
en.code.features.intuitive.description: Clean, Pythonic interface that feels natural to quantitative traders and developers alike.
en.code.features.hooks.title: Rich Hook System
en.code.features.hooks.description: Pre/post processing hooks for data, signals, and positions. Customize without modifying core code.
en.code.features.optimization.title: Built-in Optimization
en.code.features.optimization.description: Automatic caching, parallel execution, and Numba JIT compilation for maximum performance.
en.opensource.title: Open Source & Community Driven
en.opensource.description: QuantCell is proudly open source. Join our growing community of traders and developers.
en.footer.description: An open-source quantitative trading platform built for professional traders and developers.

zh.hero.description: QuantCell 是一个综合性的量化交易平台，提供策略回测、实时市场数据、多交易所支持和高级风险管理工具。
zh.features.title: 强大的量化交易功能
zh.features.subtitle: 开发、测试和部署专业交易策略所需的一切
zh.features.backtesting.title: 策略回测
zh.features.backtesting.description: 自主研发的高性能回测引擎，采用 Numba JIT 编译优化。支持事件驱动和向量化双模式，灵活应对不同场景。
zh.features.realtime.title: 实时市场数据
zh.features.realtime.description: 基于 WebSocket 的多交易所实时数据流，支持自动重连和数据完整性检查。
zh.features.exchanges.title: 多交易所支持
zh.features.exchanges.description: 统一的 API 支持 Binance、OKX 等交易所。使用一致的接口在交易所之间无缝切换。
zh.features.risk.title: 风险管理
zh.features.risk.description: 全面的风险控制，包括仓位管理、止损止盈和投资组合级别的风险监控。
zh.features.visualization.title: 高级可视化
zh.features.visualization.description: 专业的 K 线图，支持技术指标、交易标记和回测回放功能。
zh.features.plugins.title: 可扩展插件系统
zh.features.plugins.description: 模块化架构支持插件。使用自定义指标、策略和数据源轻松扩展功能。
zh.architecture.title: 现代架构
zh.architecture.description: QuantCell 采用清晰的关注点分离设计，支持快速开发、轻松测试和无缝部署。
zh.architecture.points.adapter.title: 适配器模式
zh.architecture.points.adapter.description: 策略逻辑与执行引擎分离。统一架构支持同一套代码进行回测和实盘交易。
zh.architecture.points.performance.title: 高性能
zh.architecture.points.performance.descript: 内置缓存、并行处理和 Numba 优化，实现最大执行速度。
zh.architecture.points.extensible.title: 高度可扩展
zh.architecture.points.extensible.descripti: 丰富的钩子函数和插件系统，可自定义交易工作流的各个方面。
zh.code.title: 简单而强大
zh.code.subtitle: 用纯 Python 编写策略。QuantCell 处理复杂性。
zh.code.features.intuitive.title: 直观的 API
zh.code.features.intuitive.description: 简洁、Pythonic 的接口，让量化交易者和开发者都感到自然。
zh.code.features.hooks.title: 丰富的钩子系统
zh.code.features.hooks.description: 数据、信号和仓位的预处理/后处理钩子。无需修改核心代码即可自定义。
zh.code.features.optimization.title: 内置优化
zh.code.features.optimization.description: 自动缓存、并行执行和 Numba JIT编译，实现最佳性能。
zh.opensource.title: 开源与社区驱动
zh.opensource.description: QuantCell 是自豪的开源项目。加入我们不断壮大的交易者和开发者社区。
zh.footer.description: 为专业交易者和开发者打造的开源量化交易平台。
